rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §33.091, which governs UIL steroid testing. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 33.091. PREVENTION OF ILLEGAL STEROID USE; RANDOM TESTING.
_note: Rule text concerns steroid testing in school athletics; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
